justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.validation to jakarta.validation and updates Spring Boot to 3.3.x, but it introduces spurious churn by removing unused imports (java.util.Optional, org.antlr.v4.runtime.misc.NotNull) and changing test assertions without clear necessity. The security config update to authorizeHttpRequests is correct for Spring Security 6, but the removal of javax.validation.constraints.NotBlank/NotNull imports in DTOs without adding jakarta equivalents in the same file (only in UserDto) is inconsistent.
